title: Submissions open for Wales and Africa Grant Scheme
eligibility_criteria: Community groups and organizations in Wales
description: Grants for small-scale projects in Wales that contribute to UN Sustainable Development Goals through partnerships with Africa.
relevance_reasoning: The Wales and Africa Grant Scheme is a strong match for the nonprofit's mission. It meets all minimum requirements by supporting nonprofit organizations, focusing on children and education in Sub-Saharan Africa, and relating to technology education and digital literacy through its Lifelong Learning theme. It also aligns with ideal themes such as digital literacy programs and bridging the digital divide. The grant's focus on equipping young people with skills and supporting educational needs in Africa provides a clear path for application.
how_it_helps: This grant can be used to fund the distribution of refurbished IT equipment to schools in underserved areas of Sub-Saharan Africa, particularly Kenya, under the Lifelong Learning theme. Specifically, it can support the logistics and delivery of laptops and tablets to rural schools, as well as the setup of computer labs to enable digital literacy programs. Additionally, it can fund training sessions for teachers on how to use and maintain the provided technology, ensuring sustainable impact.
matching_themes: Digital literacy programs for children/youth in Africa
Technology education, IT skills training, computer training in underserved schools
Bridging the digital divide, improving technology access for youth
ICT4Education, ICT4Development in developing countries
